architecture.summary: React SPA + Express SSE backend, useSSE hook, WorkspaceContext state management, useCreateSkill hook for generation flow

integrations.summary: LLM providers via createLlmClient, ConfigContext for provider/model selection, activation-tester.ts for classification

ui-ux.summary: ActivationPanel with test prompts, Generate button replaces hardcoded templates, test history below results, plugin recommendation flow

performance.summary: N/A - UI bug fixes and wiring, no new performance concerns. History capped at 50 runs.

security.summary: N/A - no new auth or data handling, existing provider credential flow unchanged

edge-cases.summary: Duplicate SSE dispatch, draft orphaning on plugin change, model override not reaching endpoint
